task_completion.visual_evidence: Spreadsheet application (e.g., Excel or LibreOffice Calc) is open displaying the 'nutrition_calculator.xlsx' file.

task_completion.description: Calculate Total Nutrients for the batch on the 'Recipe' sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Recipe' sheet shows calculated nutrient values for the entire batch, derived from ingredient weights and the 'Ingredient_DB'.

task_completion.description: Determine the 'Baked Batch Weight' in cell B16 using a 12% bake loss factor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cell B16 on the 'Recipe' sheet contains a value representing the baked weight (raw weight reduced by 12%).

task_completion.description: Calculate 'Nutrients Per Serving' based on a 30g serving size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Recipe' sheet displays per-serving nutrient values, calculated by dividing the total nutrients by the number of 30g servings in the baked batch.

task_completion.description: Populate the 'Nutrition_Facts' sheet with values rounded according to FDA rules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Nutrition_Facts' sheet is filled with rounded values (Calories to nearest 10, Total Fat to nearest 0.5g/1g, Sodium to nearest 10mg, and Carbs/Fiber/Sugars/Protein to nearest 1g).
The spreadsheet shows no unsaved changes indicator (e.g., no asterisk in the title bar) or a save action is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the spreadsheet application GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show LibreOffice Calc or Excel being used, rather than a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas rather than hardcoding calculated values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows actual formulas (e.g., references to other sheets, math operations, or ROUND functions) when cells are selected.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Python scripts or terminal commands to bypass manual spreadsheet work.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing scripts to modify the .xlsx file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The expected Total Fat is 6g and Protein is 2g. The tolerance for weight checks is 5.0.
